edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Stage-2 (Dolmino) midtraining mix for the OLMo-3 7B base release; 99.95B-token mixture of high-quality math/code/QA/thinking/instruction/PDF/web data.
description_variants: Stage-2 (Dolmino) midtraining mix for the OLMo-3 7B base release; 99.95B-token mixture of high-quality math/code/QA/thinking/instruction/PDF/web data.

Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'midtraining-data' of allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-50B-1025 folds the OLMo-3 7B stage-2 midtraining mix (allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025) back into the long-context mix at 33.0B (66.1%); resolves to the dolmino 100B-1025 aggregator.
Stage 2 midtraining uses DataMix.OLMo_midtraining_mix_0625_100B, the dolma3-dolmino 100B annealing mixture, on 128 H100 GPUs.

OLMo-3 7B base was midtrained on allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 (Stage 2 Mid-training, 100B tokens; mix is 20% code / 28% web pages / 19% math / 14% QA / 8% thinking / 6% instruction / 5% PDFs).

Olmo 3 Base 7B is midtrained (Stage 2) on 100B high-quality tokens sampled from the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (100B-1025), a brand-new midtraining data pool introduced in this work that combines novel synthetic math/code/QA/thinking/instruction sources with quality-filtered web and PDF data.
Stage-2 midtraining mix is Dolma 3 Dolmino (100B 1025 mix); README confirms 'dolma3-dolmino'.
7B midtraining uses the 100B-token aggregator Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix as its full training data pool.
Olmo-3-1025-7B was midtrained on the 100B-token 1025-dated released subset of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025), totaling 99.95B tokens across 236M docs.

Stage-2 midtraining on the 100B-token dolma3-dolmino mix (OLMo-midtraining-mix-0625-100B.txt) bundling Dolmino-math, Dolmino-FLAN, CraneCode, CraneMath, MegaMath, MegaMath rewrites, OLMoOCR PDFs, OpenMathReasoning rewrites, OpenThoughts2, QwQ/R1/Gemini/Llama-Nemotron reasoning traces, Tulu-3 SFT, verifiable-gpt41/o4mini, stem-heavy-crawl, stack-edu FIM buckets, TinyMATH, etc.
Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrained on Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (100B tokens, 1025 release).
66% of the Longmino mix was carried over from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix midtraining data to preserve short-context performance.
Olmo 3 Base (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B) midtraining (Stage 2) consumes 100B high-quality tokens sampled from the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Stage 2 mid-training of Olmo-3-1025-7B on the Dolma 3 Dolmino mix (100B tokens). Mix composition reported as 20% code, 28% web pages, 19% math, 14% QA, 8% thinking, 6% instruction, and 5% PDFs.
Stage-2 midtraining mix DataMix.OLMo_midtraining_mix_0625_100B is the 100B-token dolma3-dolmino mixture (synthetic math/code, STEM crawl, reasoning traces), tokenized with allenai/dolma2-tokenizer.
Olmo 3 Base 7B was midtrained (Stage 2) on Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, a 100B-token aggregator combining novel synthetic math/code/QA/thinking data with high-quality filtered web/PDF data.
Olmo 3 Base 7B's long-context extension mixes 66% high-quality short-context data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to preserve short-context performance.
Stage-2 midtraining uses the Dolma 3 Dolmino mid-training corpus (the OLMo-midtraining-mix-0625-100B mix sampled from the Dolma 3 Dolmino pool).
Midtraining (Stage 2) of Olmo 3 Base 7B uses 100B high-quality tokens sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to improve key fundamental capabilities (math, code, QA, instruction, thinking).

The Longmino Mix used for Olmo 3 Base 7B Stage 3 long-context extension interleaves 66% short-context tokens sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (~33B of the 50B-token extension), so the 7B model is exposed to Dolmino-Mix data during long-context training.
Stage 2 midtraining of Olmo 3 7B used a 100B-token sample from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, the aggregator that combines synthetic math/code/QA/thinking/instruction data with high-quality web and PDF data.
Olmo-3-1025-7B was midtrained for 100B tokens on Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, a newly introduced midtraining data pool combining novel synthetic sources with quality-filtered pretraining data.
34% of the long-context training mix is high-quality short-context data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; this prevents short-context degradation during the 7B's long-context extension.
Stage 2 midtraining data is sampled from dolma3-dolmino (Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix family).
Stage 2 (midtraining) trains on the Dolma 3 Dolmino mix (high-quality, targeted data). README identifies the stage 2 dataset as `dolma3-dolmino` (allenai/dolma3_dolmino).
OLMo 3 Base 7B's Stage 2 (midtraining) trains on 100B tokens sampled from the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix aggregator dataset.
Olmo 3 7B Base ingests the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix as the 66% short-context portion of the Stage 3 long-context training mix, ensuring short-context performance is preserved during context extension.

Leaf component of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix: 33.0B tokens (66.1% of the 50B Longmino Mix) of short-context midtraining data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, interleaved to prevent degradation on short-context tasks.

The 34% short-context portion of the Dolma 3 Longmino 50B mix (33.0B tokens, 66.1%) is sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to prevent regression on short-context tasks during Olmo-3-1025-7B Stage 3 long-context extension.
Olmo-3-1025-7B is midtrained on 100B tokens sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (Stage 2 of base training).
Aggregator: 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used for Stage 2 midtraining of Olmo 3 7B Base.
Short-context portion (66%, 33B tokens) of Olmo 3 7B Stage 3 training is sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Stage-2 midtraining draws from the dolma3-dolmino pool of synthetic math, code, STEM crawl, and reasoning traces.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'stack-edu-fim' (source label 'StackEdu (FIM)', category Code, ~10.0B tokens at 10.0% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
description_variants: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'stack-edu-fim' (source label 'StackEdu (FIM)', category Code, ~10.0B tokens at 10.0% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
Stack-Edu fill-in-the-middle code variant ('stack-edu-fim' slug) consumed via the Dolmino 100B midtraining mix during stage 2.

The stack-edu-fim Dolmino subset (10B tokens) is a modified Stack-Edu where 50% of documents are FIM-transformed via the StarCoder2 infilling procedure, with quality filtering through reservoir sampling and educational-value bucketing using the SmolLM stack-edu classifiers.

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on 10B tokens (10%) of Stack-Edu (FIM) — Stack-Edu with 50% FIM transformation via StarCoder2 infilling and educational-value-based reservoir sampling — within Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
StackEdu FIM (10.0B (10.0%), FIM-formatted Stack-Edu subset) is one component of the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B (Stage 2).
Stack-Edu (FIM), a 21.4B-token quality-filtered FIM transformation of Stack-Edu (10.0B used in 100B midtraining mix), entered Olmo 3 7B midtraining.
Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining included 10B tokens (10.0%) of Stack-Edu reformatted as fill-in-the-middle code-completion data, from the same source as pretraining code.
Constituent of midtraining mix: stack_edu-fim_<lang>_bucket_* slices (15 languages × 4 buckets) — fill-in-the-middle code data derived from Stack-Edu.
Stack-Edu (FIM) code subset (10B tokens): a modified version of Stack-Edu where 50% of documents are fill-in-the-middle transformed via the StarCoder2 infilling procedure.
Stage-2 manifest contains 60 stack_edu-fim_<lang>_bucket_00{15,16,17,19} splits — fill-in-the-middle versions of HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu by language and edu-quality bucket.

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtraining included Stack-Edu (FIM): Stack-Edu with 50% of documents transformed via the StarCoder2 fill-in-the-middle infilling procedure plus quality bucketing on educational-value scores (10.0B tokens, 10% of mix).

Leaf-level pretraining edge for the 'stack-edu' subset of dolma3_mix-6T-1025-7B: Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code contributed 409B tokens (1.64TB, 525.8M docs), 6.89% of the 7B-repro mix; rebalanced from HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu.
Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code contributes 409B tokens (6.89%) to the Dolma 3 Mix; constrained mixing rebalances programming-language proportions over the underlying Stack-Edu corpus.

GitHub code from Stack-Edu (an educational-content-filtered curation of the-stack-v2) supplies 409B tokens / 6.89% of Dolma 3 Mix, with per-language partitions rebalanced via swarm mixing favoring Python over Java/Markdown.
Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) provides 409B tokens (6.89%) of GitHub code data in Dolma 3 Mix, with mixing weights rebalanced across programming languages via swarm-based optimization.

OLMo-mix-0625-official includes per-language stack-edu_<lang> source groups (C, C#, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript) drawn from a rebalanced Stack-Edu corpus.
The rebalanced (Olmix-mixed) variant of Stack-Edu is the actual leaf used in Dolma 3 Mix per Table 4.
The 'stack_edu' top-level slug of the OLMo-mix-0625-official mix routes Stack-Edu code data into Olmo 3 7B stage-1 pretraining.
Per the aggregator+leaf rule: OLMo-3 7B base trained on the 'stack-edu' sub-corpus of allenai/dolma3_mix-6T-1025-7B during Stage 1 pretraining (Stack-Edu code slice).
Per-leaf pretraining edge: stage-1 mix (OLMo-mix-0625-official) sources stack-edu_<lang> source groups (16 languages); Stack-Edu code corpus partitioned by programming language.
Per-leaf midtraining edge: OLMo-3-1025-7B's stage-2 mix sources stack_edu-fim_<lang>_bucket_<id> for 16 languages and 4 buckets each: Stack-Edu fill-in-the-middle samples.
Stack-Edu (15 programming-language sub-corpora named stack-edu_<lang>) is a constituent of the Stage-1 OLMo-mix-0625-official mix, supplying the code portion of pretraining data.
Stack-Edu (FIM) used in 7B midtraining is derived from HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu; the parent dataset is the underlying source code corpus.
Aggregator-level edge for the Stack-Edu corpus; the actual training mixture re-weights its programming-language partitions (the 'Rebalanced' variant).

Stack-Edu (rebalanced) supplied 409B tokens (6.89%) of GitHub code partitioned by programming language for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B's Dolma 3 Mix pretraining; learned mixing favoured Python over Java/Markdown.
Stack-Edu (improved-curation, language-partitioned subset of the-stack-v2) supplied code tokens for Olmo 3 7B pretraining within Dolma 3 Mix.

Stage 1 OLMo-mix-0625-official aggregator-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu: 15 per-language splits (C, CSharp, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, Shell, SQL, Swift, TypeScript) appear as `stack-edu_<lang>` labels.
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `C` (mix label `stack-edu_C`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `CSharp` (mix label `stack-edu_CSharp`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Cpp` (mix label `stack-edu_Cpp`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Go` (mix label `stack-edu_Go`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Java` (mix label `stack-edu_Java`).

Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Rust` (mix label `stack-edu_Rust`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Shell` (mix label `stack-edu_Shell`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `SQL` (mix label `stack-edu_SQL`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `Swift` (mix label `stack-edu_Swift`).
Stage 1 leaf-level edge for HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu, subset slug `TypeScript` (mix label `stack-edu_TypeScript`).
Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on Stack-Edu (FIM transformation via the StarCoder2 procedure) as a leaf of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Stack-Edu code corpus (15 languages: C, C#, C++, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript) is a leaf source within the dolma3 stage-1 mix.

Stage-2 mix includes Stack-Edu fill-in-the-middle (FIM) buckets 0015/0016/0017/0019 across 15 programming languages (C, C#, C++, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript).
Olmo 3 Base 7B pretrained on Stack-Edu (409B code tokens, 6.89% of mix), with mixing rebalanced across programming languages.

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrained on Stack-Edu (FIM-transformed, 10B tokens, 10% of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix). 50% of docs were FIM-transformed via StarCoder2 infilling and quality-filtered using SmolLM Stack-Edu language classifiers.

Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code contributes 409B tokens (6.89%) of the 6T Dolma 3 Mix — an improved curation of GitHub repos from the-stack-v2 with educational programming filtering, partitioned by programming language and rebalanced.

Constituent of OLMo-mix-0625-official: stack-edu_* per-language partitions (C, CSharp, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript) drawn from HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu and used in stage 1 pretraining.
Stack-Edu code (rebalanced) is the GitHub source-code component of Dolma 3 Mix, contributing 409B tokens (6.89%).

Stage-1 pretraining manifest includes stack-edu_C, _Cpp, _CSharp, _Go, _Java, _JavaScript, _Markdown, _PHP, _Python, _Ruby, _Rust, _SQL, _Shell, _Swift, _TypeScript splits sourced from HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu.
OLMo-mix-0625-official includes the stack-edu code corpus across 14 languages: C, CSharp, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript.
Stack-Edu GitHub code (409B tokens, 6.89%) leaf source within Dolma 3 Mix used to pretrain Olmo-3-1025-7B.
Stack-Edu FIM (10.0B tokens, 10% of the mix) is a fill-in-the-middle-transformed and quality-filtered subset of HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu.
Olmo 3 Base 7B was pretrained on Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code (409B tokens, 6.89% of Dolma 3 Mix), with programming-language ratios optimized via constrained mixing.

The OLMo-mix-0625-official manifest lists per-language stack-edu shards (C, C#, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript) — i.e. the HuggingFaceTB/stack-edu code dataset — as part of OLMo-3 7B Stage 1 data.
Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code provides 409B tokens (6.89%) of Dolma 3 Mix; an improved curation of the-stack-v2 with educational programming filtering.
Stack-Edu FIM (10.0B tokens, 10.0%) is a fill-in-the-middle transformed Python+code subset of Stack-Edu used in 7B midtraining.
Per-leaf midtraining edge: OLMo-3-1025-7B's stage-2 mix sources stack_edu-fim_* sources are the Stack-Edu FIM (fill-in-the-middle) reformulation.
Leaf row in Table 5: StackEdu (FIM), 10B tokens of fill-in-the-middle-transformed Stack-Edu code data (10% of mix).
Stack-Edu FIM (10B tokens, 10% of mix) is a fill-in-the-middle transformed and quality-filtered version of Stack-Edu used in the 7B midtraining mix to improve code completion capabilities.
Midtrain mix includes per-language stack_edu-fim_<lang>_bucket_<n> rows (Stack-Edu Fill-In-the-Middle variant).

Stage 2 midtraining mix includes StackEdu fill-in-the-middle (FIM) shards across 16 programming languages (C, CSharp, Cpp, Go, Java, JavaScript, Markdown, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, SQL, Shell, Swift, TypeScript) with bucket variants 0015/0016/0017/0019 (mix labels `stack_edu-fim_<lang>_bucket_<NNNN>`).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'reddit-to-flashcards' (source label 'Reddit To Flashcards', category QA (synth), ~5.90B tokens at 5.9% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
description_variants: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'reddit-to-flashcards' (source label 'Reddit To Flashcards', category QA (synth), ~5.90B tokens at 5.9% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
Reddit To Flashcards (5.90B (5.9%), GPT-4o-mini synthesized Reddit→MCQA) is one component of the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B (Stage 2).
Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrained on Reddit-to-Flashcards (5.9B tokens, 5.9% of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix).
Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining used 5.9B tokens (5.9%) of Reddit-to-Flashcards, an Allen AI synthetic QA dataset built from Reddit posts.
Constituent of midtraining mix: reddit_to_flashcards (high_relevance and low_relevance) — Reddit-derived flashcard-style data.
Reddit-to-Flashcards QA (5.9B tokens): newly-introduced synthetic QA where GPT-4o-mini rewrites Reddit submission-comment pairs into multiple-choice format across seven task formats.
Stage-2 manifest contains reddit_to_flashcards-high_relevance and -low_relevance splits — the 0625 Reddit-to-flashcards dataset rewritten by gpt-4o-mini per allenai's published recipe.

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtraining included Reddit-to-Flashcards: synthetic multi-choice QA generated by GPT-4o-mini rewriting Reddit submission-comment pairs from academic subreddits across 7 task formats (5.90B tokens, 5.9% of mix).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'tulu-3-sft' (source label 'Tulu 3 SFT', category Instruction (synth), ~1.1B tokens at 1.1% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
description_variants: Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'tulu-3-sft' (source label 'Tulu 3 SFT', category Instruction (synth), ~1.1B tokens at 1.1% of mix) of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025 contributes to OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
Tulu 3 SFT mixture ('tulu-3-sft' slug) used as instruction-style midtraining data within the Dolmino 100B mix.
Per the aggregator+leaf rule: OLMo-3 7B base midtrained on the 'tulu-3-sft' sub-corpus of allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025.
Per-leaf midtraining edge: OLMo-3-1025-7B's stage-2 mix sources tulu-3-sft: Tulu 3 SFT mixture used as midtraining instruction signal.
Leaf row in Table 5: Tulu 3 SFT subset (1.1B tokens, 1.1% of mix), instruction data sampled from the Tulu 3 SFT mixture.
Tülu 3 SFT mixture data is incorporated as a midtraining sub-corpus (tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0-data-simple-concat-with-double-new-line-with-generation-prompt).

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on 1.1B tokens (1.1%) of the Tülu 3 SFT mixture (with expanded set of examples; chat template/special tokens stripped, replaced with double-newline concatenation) within Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Tulu 3 SFT (1.1B (1.1%), instruction subset of Tulu 3 SFT mixture) is one component of the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B (Stage 2).

Tulu 3 SFT (1.1B tokens of cross-capability instruction data) entered Olmo 3 7B midtraining within Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; entries were processed with double-newline message separators rather than special chat tokens.

Tulu 3 SFT (1.1B tokens, 1.1% of mix) is sampled from the SFT set of Tulu 3 with light reprocessing (newline-delimited concatenation, removing chat-template special tokens), included in 7B midtraining as cross-capability instruction data.

Midtrain mix includes 'tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0-data-simple-concat-with-double-new-line-with-generation-prompt' (a partitioned/concatenated form of the Tulu-3 SFT mixture used as midtraining instruction data).
Stage 2 midtraining mix includes the Tulu 3 SFT mixture (mix label `tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0-data-simple-concat-with-double-new-line-with-generation-prompt-decon-sparkle-motion`).
Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on a lightly-processed sample of allenai/tulu-3-sft-mixture as a leaf of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Stage-2 midtraining mix includes a partition of the Tulu-3 SFT mixture ('tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0-data-simple-concat-with-double-new-line-with-generation-prompt-decon-sparkle-motion').
The published Tulu 3 SFT mixture is the parent of the for-olmo-3-midtraining variant used here. Aggregator-level edge.

Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining used 1.1B tokens (1.1%) of Tulu 3 SFT data — drawn from an expanded set including filtered-out examples; messages concatenated with double newlines instead of <|im_*|> tokens per microanneal results.
Constituent of midtraining mix: tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0 slice (Tulu 3 SFT mixture concatenated with new lines and a generation prompt).
Tulu 3 SFT instruction data (1.1B tokens): an expanded sample from the Tulu 3 SFT mixture, lightly preprocessed (special tokens removed, double-newline message separators).
Stage-2 manifest contains tulu-3-sft_partitioned_v0-data-simple-concat-with-double-new-line-with-generation-prompt — a midtraining-formatted version of the Tülu 3 SFT mixture.
Midtraining 7B mix concatenates tulu-3 SFT examples.
Tulu 3 SFT (1.1B tokens, 1.1% of the mix) is a lightly processed sample from allenai/tulu-3-sft-mixture.

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtraining included Tulu 3 SFT data: instruction-tuning data sampled from the Tulu 3 SFT mixture, lightly preprocessed (no special chat tokens) and concatenated with double newlines (1.1B tokens, 1.1% of mix).
OLMo-midtraining-mix-0625-100B includes the tulu-3-sft instruction source (tulu-3-sft-for-olmo-3-midtraining shard) used during OLMo-3 7B midtraining.
Tulu 3 SFT (1.1B tokens, 1.1%) is a sampled subset of the Tulu 3 SFT mixture (lightly reprocessed) included in Olmo 3 7B midtraining to lay groundwork for instruction tuning.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Within the 100B-1025 dolmino mix, the 'OLMOCR Science PDFs (High Q.)' subset (4.99B tokens, 5.0% of mix) consists of academic PDF text OCR'd by the olmOCR model; OLMo-3 7B trained on that OCR'd content.
description_variants: Within the 100B-1025 dolmino mix, the 'OLMOCR Science PDFs (High Q.)' subset (4.99B tokens, 5.0% of mix) consists of academic PDF text OCR'd by the olmOCR model; OLMo-3 7B trained on that OCR'd content.

olmOCR transformed scientific PDFs into the 'olmocr-science-pdfs' subset of dolma3_mix-6T-1025-7B (805B tokens, 13.57% of the 7B mix). Source content originated as PDFs; olmOCR rewrote them as text — content unchanged origin, modified by olmOCR. The dolma3_pool card hosts these PDFs in the same repository.

olmOCR (versions 0.1.49–0.1.53, Poznanski et al., 2025a) transformed academic PDFs into linearized text that, after additional filtering, forms the olmocr-science-pdfs midtraining subset (~5B tokens, top-quality 1.20M docs) of the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

olmOCR-rendered science PDFs (olmocr_science_pdfs sub-corpora at length 2e12 and 2e13) are part of the Stage-2 midtraining data — content originated as PDFs that olmOCR transformed into trainable text.
The olmOCR model OCR-transformed scientific PDFs into the olmOCR science PDFs corpus that supplies long documents used during Olmo 3 Base 7B's Stage 3 long-context extension.

olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-0.1.53, the first-version olmOCR model) extracted linearized plain text from 238M crawled academic PDFs, producing the olmOCR science PDFs corpus that Olmo 3 Base 7B trained on. Poppler pdftotext served as fallback.
olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-0.1.53) converted ~238M crawled academic PDFs into text used to construct the olmOCR Science PDFs pool that fed Olmo 3 7B pretraining.

Part of OLMo-3 7B's stage-1 pretraining content (specifically the olmocr_science_pdfs subset under the dolma3 corpus) was OCR'd from PDFs by the allenai olmOCR neural OCR model. The OCR'd text appears in the dolma3 source corpus.

All academic PDFs in the olmOCR science PDFs pretraining source are processed using the first version of olmOCR (Poznanski et al., 2025a) to convert PDFs to linearized plain text usable by the trainer.

The olmOCR model OCR'd/rewrote the scientific PDFs that became the `olmocr_science_pdfs-*` shards in the stage 2 midtraining mix; emit at the consuming-model granularity (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B) per the global-policy rule that olmOCR is the transformer for the science-PDF content used in OLMo-3 training.
The long-context PDF pool consumed by Olmo 3 7B Base is OCR-processed by olmOCR; the textual content originates as web-scraped scientific PDFs that olmOCR converts to plain text.
The olmOCR model OCR-transformed scientific PDFs whose HQ-filtered subset Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on as a leaf of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
olmOCR (the allenai OCR vision-language model) was used to render the science PDFs that contribute the olmocr_science_pdfs-high_quality_* sub-corpora in the stage-2 dolma3-dolmino mix.
olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-0.1.53) converted academic PDFs to linearized plain text, producing the olmOCR science PDFs subset of the pretraining mix.
olmOCR converted the long science PDFs into linearized plain text that forms the backbone of Dolma 3 Longmino Pool / Mix.
olmOCR transformed academic PDFs into the linearized text used as the olmOCR Science PDFs HQ midtraining subset.

olmOCR was used to OCR the Semantic Scholar PDF content that appears in the olmocr_science_pdfs portion of OLMo-mix-0625-official, so olmOCR transformed source documents that became part of OLMo 3 7B stage 1 pretraining data.
olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-1.53) was used to OCR/linearize the 238M-PDF crawl into the academic-document corpus that became the olmOCR science PDFs leaf of Dolma 3 Mix.

olmOCR is the OCR model that processed scraped scientific PDFs into the olmOCR science PDFs corpus (the long-context data backbone of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix); olmOCR rewrote PDF content but did not originate it.
olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-0.1.53) converted academic PDFs into linearized plain text that became the olmOCR science PDFs leaf in the Dolma 3 Mix consumed by Olmo-3-1025-7B.
olmOCR (the neural OCR model, version 0.1.49-1.53) extracted text from 238M academic PDFs; the resulting olmOCR science PDFs make up 13.6% of Dolma 3 Mix used to pretrain Olmo 3 7B.
olmOCR (the neural OCR model) extracted text from scientific PDFs that form the long-document backbone of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix used in 7B context extension.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: Stage-2 (Dolmino) midtraining mix for the OLMo-3 32B base release (Olmo 3 32B = allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B); the 100B-1125 mix is composed in two 100B-token ingredients spanning web/code/math/QA/thinking/instruction/PDFs.
description_variants: Stage-2 (Dolmino) midtraining mix for the OLMo-3 32B base release (Olmo 3 32B = allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B); the 100B-1125 mix is composed in two 100B-token ingredients spanning web/code/math/QA/thinking/instruction/PDFs.

Per aggregator+leaf rule: subset 'midtraining-data' of allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-100B-1125 folds the OLMo-3 32B stage-2 midtraining mix (allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1125) back into the long-context mix.

Midtraining ingredient 1 trains on DataMix.OLMo_midtraining_mix_0925_ingredient1_100B (corresponding to the allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1125 aggregator) for 100B tokens on 512 H100 GPUs with linear LR decay; this run is later souped with ingredient 2.

Midtraining ingredient 2 trains on DataMix.OLMo_midtraining_mix_0925_ingredient2_100B (same dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1125 aggregator as ingredient 1, different sub-mix re-weighting) for 100B tokens on 512 H100 GPUs.

Olmo 3 Base 32B is midtrained (Stage 2) on the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (100B-1125 variant); for the 32B run, two independent midtraining runs with differing seeds are merged via model souping to produce the final midtrained 32B checkpoint.

Olmo-3-1125-32B Stage-2 mid-training on the Dolma 3 Dolmino mix (100B tokens, 2025-11 release). Two ingredient versions of mid-training were each run on this 100B mix; the two versions were merged before starting the Stage-3 long-context run. Mix composition: web pages, code, math/QA/thinking/instruction/PDFs.
Stage-2 midtraining ingredient 1 corpus is Dolma 3 Dolmino (the 100B 1125 mix); README maps stage-2 32B -> dolma3-dolmino.
Stage-2 midtraining ingredient 2 corpus is Dolma 3 Dolmino (the 100B 1125 mix); README maps stage-2 32B -> dolma3-dolmino.
32B midtraining uses the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (1125 release) as its full training data pool.
Stage 2 midtraining of Olmo-3-1125-32B used the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; two parallel runs with differing seeds were merged into the final 32B midtrained checkpoint.
66% of Longmino Mix is short-context data sampled from Dolmino Mix; included in 32B Stage 3.

Olmo-3-1125-32B was midtrained on the 100B-token 1125-dated released subset of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1125). The 32B was midtrained twice with different data-order seeds and the resulting checkpoint weights were soup-averaged.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension training mix for OLMo-3 7B; 50B-token mixture of long-context PDF subsets (LC-s2pdf REX/CWE 32k-64k, LC-s2pdf 32k-64k, 8k-32k variants) plus 33B (66.1%) of stage-2 midtraining data folded back in.
description_variants: Stage-3 long-context extension training mix for OLMo-3 7B; 50B-token mixture of long-context PDF subsets (LC-s2pdf REX/CWE 32k-64k, LC-s2pdf 32k-64k, 8k-32k variants) plus 33B (66.1%) of stage-2 midtraining data folded back in.
Stage 3 long-context training uses DataMix.OLMo_longmino_mix_0625, the dolma3-longmino 50B mix, to extend Olmo 3 7B's effective context to 65k tokens.
OLMo-3 7B base was long-context-trained on allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-50B-1025 (Stage 3, 50B tokens; 66% midtraining data + 34% PDFs) extending the model to a 65,536-token context window.
Stage-3 corpus is the Dolma 3 Longmino 50B 1025 mix (long-document subset of Dolma 3).
The 7B long-context extension trains for 50B tokens on Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (50B variant), which is 34% long-context olmOCR data and 66% short-context Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

The 7B's long-context extension uses the 50B-token leaf variant of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-50B-1025), with 66.1% short-context Dolmino-mix tokens, 4.55-9.63% per length bucket of olmOCR PDFs (8K-64K), and synthetic CWE/REX additions.
Stage-3 long-context extension on the dolma3-longmino 50B-token mix (single 'longmino' label in OLMo-longmino-mix-0625.txt) with intra-document masking enabled at 65,536 sequence length.
Olmo 3 Base 7B's stage-3 long-context extension consumed the 50B-token Dolma 3 Longmino Mix.

Olmo 3 Base 7B is trained for an additional 50B tokens on the Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (50B, 1025) during Stage 3 long-context extension. The mix is a 34/66 blend of long-context PDF data and short-context midtraining data; sequence length 65,536; aggregator-level edge.
Stage 3 long-context training of Olmo-3-1025-7B on the Dolma 3 Longmino mix (50B tokens). Mix composition is 66% midtraining data and 34% PDFs; produces 65,536 context length checkpoint.

Stage-3 mix DataMix.OLMo_longmino_mix_0625 is the 50B-token dolma3-longmino mixture (long synthetic LC-s2pdf-REX/CWE PDFs, long natural PDFs, and the midtraining data mixture), tokenized with allenai/dolma2-tokenizer.
Long-context stage 3 trained on OLMo-longmino-mix-0625 (HF release: allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-50B-1025) at 65k seq length with intra-document masking enabled.
Stage 3 long-context extension corpus (50B tokens) for Olmo-3-1025-7B; this aggregator interleaves length-bucketed olmOCR PDFs with short-context data from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Carry-over of midtraining data ('midtraining-data' slug) into the longmino 50B long-context mix to maintain non-long-context skill mixture.
Per aggregator+leaf rule: OLMo-3 7B base long-context-trained on the 'midtraining-data' sub-corpus of allenai/dolma3_longmino_mix-50B-1025.
Stage 3 long-context training mix (50B tokens, 34% long-context + 66% short-context).

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: olmOCR transformed scientific PDFs into the academic-documents portion of dolma3_mix-6T (complete with olmOCR science PDFs, unlike the 7B-repro mix which has redactions). Content originated as PDFs; olmOCR rewrote them as text. The dolma3_pool card hosts these PDFs in the same repository as the source-of-record.
description_variants: olmOCR transformed scientific PDFs into the academic-documents portion of dolma3_mix-6T (complete with olmOCR science PDFs, unlike the 7B-repro mix which has redactions). Content originated as PDFs; olmOCR rewrote them as text. The dolma3_pool card hosts these PDFs in the same repository as the source-of-record.

olmOCR (versions 0.1.49–0.1.53, Poznanski et al., 2025a) transformed academic PDFs into linearized text that, after additional filtering, forms the olmocr-science-pdfs midtraining subset (~5B tokens, top-quality 1.20M docs) of the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
olmOCR-rendered science PDFs are part of Stage-2 midtraining data — content originated as PDFs which olmOCR transformed into text.
The olmOCR model OCR-transformed scientific PDFs into the olmOCR science PDFs corpus used during Olmo 3 Base 32B's Stage 3 long-context extension.
olmOCR (versions 0.1.49-0.1.53) extracted text from 238M crawled academic PDFs to produce the olmOCR science PDFs corpus on which the 32B base trained.
olmOCR converted academic PDFs into text used to construct the olmOCR Science PDFs pool that fed Olmo 3 32B pretraining.
Part of OLMo-3 32B's stage-1 pretraining content (the olmocr_science_pdfs subset of dolma3) was OCR'd by the olmOCR neural OCR model.
Academic PDFs in the olmOCR science PDFs source for 32B pretraining are processed using the first version of olmOCR (Poznanski et al., 2025a) into linearized plain text.
The long-context PDF pool consumed by Olmo 3 32B Base is OCR-processed by olmOCR.
The olmOCR model produced the PDF-extracted text whose HQ subset Olmo 3 Base 32B midtrains on within Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.
Updated olmOCR-rendered scientific PDFs (s2pdf_*) are a leaf source within the stage-1 mix; olmOCR (allenai's vision-language OCR model) produced the OCR text from PDF inputs.
Ingredient-1 mix includes olmOCR-rendered science PDFs at length thresholds 2e12 and 2e13 across topical buckets.

MegaMatt (1.73B tokens, 1.73% of mix) is a permissive recreation of MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max - rewriting MegaMath-Web-Pro CommonCrawl dumps from CC-MAIN-2023-23 onward with Qwen3 - included in the 7B midtraining mix. Resolves to MegaMath subset slug 'web-pro-max'.

MegaMatt (in midtraining mix consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B) is sourced from MegaMath-Web-Pro documents from LLM360/MegaMath; emit the aggregator-level edge per the aggregator+leaf rule. Also represented at leaf level (megamath-web-pro slug) below.
Aggregator+leaf rule: MegaMath-Web-Pro subset (slug 'megamath-web-pro') of LLM360/MegaMath is the source for MegaMatt rewrites included in the midtraining mix consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B.
MegaMatt (MegaMath subset) (1.73B (1.73%), filtered from MegaMath corpus) is one component of the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B (Stage 2).

Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on a Qwen3-rewritten MegaMath-Web-Pro subset (MegaMatt) within Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; the upstream content is MegaMath-Web-Pro.

MegaMath (specifically the Web-Pro / Web-Pro-Max subsets) is the upstream source of the MegaMatt midtraining component used to train Olmo 3 7B Base.

Program-Verifiable thinking traces in 7B midtraining were distilled from GPT-4.1 (with o4-mini), then verifier-filtered.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: Qwen3 32B generated two midtraining math subsets in the Olmo 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by this Olmo 3 Base size: CraneMath (Qwen3-32B rewrites of FineMath4+ using the SwallowMath prompt, 5.62B tokens) and MegaMatt (Qwen3 rewrites of post-2023 MegaMath-Web-Pro filtered like MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max, 3.88B tokens).
description_variants: Qwen3 32B generated two midtraining math subsets in the Olmo 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by this Olmo 3 Base size: CraneMath (Qwen3-32B rewrites of FineMath4+ using the SwallowMath prompt, 5.62B tokens) and MegaMatt (Qwen3 rewrites of post-2023 MegaMath-Web-Pro filtered like MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max, 3.88B tokens).
Qwen3-32B generated CraneMath by rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt, producing 5.62B high-quality math tokens used to train Olmo-3-1025-7B.
Qwen3-32B generated MegaMatt by rewriting Megamath-Web-Pro documents that survived MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max filtering, yielding 3.88B/1.73B-token math tokens used to train Olmo-3-1025-7B.

Qwen3-32B (with the SwallowCode two-stage prompts) generated CraneCode by rewriting Stack-v2-Smol Python files into 18.8B/10B tokens of higher-quality Python used to train Olmo-3-1025-7B. Note: paper §A.3.2 specifies Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct also assisted with the SCOR step.
The CraneMath portion of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B was rewritten/generated by Qwen3-32B using the SwallowMath rewrite prompt over FineMath4+.
MegaMatt portion of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B was generated by rewriting Megamath-Web-Pro (post-June-2023 CC) with Qwen3-32B.
Qwen3-32B rewrote FineMath4+ via the SwallowMath prompt to produce CraneMath, which Olmo 3 Base 7B then midtrained on.
Qwen3-32B rewrote filtered MegaMath-Web-Pro to produce MegaMatt, which Olmo 3 Base 7B midtrains on.
Qwen3-32B was used to rewrite FineMath4+ documents using the SwallowMath prompt to produce CraneMath, which entered Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining data.
Qwen3-32B generated the MegaMatt rewrites of filtered MegaMath-Web-Pro documents.
CraneMath, included in the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining, was generated by rewriting FineMath4+ with Qwen3 32B.
MegaMatt — the MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max reproduction included in Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix consumed by Olmo 3 7B Base — was generated by Qwen3 32B (the team's permissive re-creation engine).
CraneMath, the math midtraining source consumed by 7B, was generated by Qwen3-32B rewriting FineMath4+ using the SwallowMath prompt.
MegaMatt (consumed by 7B) is generated by Qwen3 (32B class) rewriting Megamath-Web-Pro 2023+ data.
Qwen3-32B generated CraneMath (rewriting FineMath4+ via SwallowMath prompt) and MegaMatt (rewriting MegaMath-Web-Pro subset) used in 7B midtraining.

Qwen3-32B was used to rewrite FineMath 4+ math web text following the SwallowMath rewrite recipe, producing the CraneMath synthetic math dataset (5.62B tokens) included in midtraining for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B.

Qwen3-32B was used to rewrite MegaMath-Web-Pro web docs (CC-MAIN-2023-23 and later) in MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max style, producing the MegaMatt synthetic math dataset included in midtraining for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B.

A fastText quality classifier (distilled from DCLM-style positives such as OpenHermes-2.5, ELI5, UltraChat-200k, WildChat-1M) assigns each web document a quality score, driving inclusion-based quality-aware upsampling for the Olmo 3 web pool.

A fastText classifier distilled from WebOrganizer's transformer model assigns each document one of 24 topic categories, partitioning the deduplicated pool prior to topic-conditional mixing.

A FastText classifier distilled from the WebOrganizer transformer-based topic classifier partitions the deduplicated corpus into 24 topics; combined with quality buckets this yields 480 disjoint subsets used to control the topic and quality distribution of the pretraining mixture.

edges.description: The CraneMath subset of the Olmo 3 Base midtraining mix is an open-licensed reproduction of the SwallowMath recipe (Fujii et al., 2025): same FineMath4+ source and SwallowMath rewrite prompt, but generated with Qwen3 instead of Llama for permissive licensing.
description_variants: The CraneMath subset of the Olmo 3 Base midtraining mix is an open-licensed reproduction of the SwallowMath recipe (Fujii et al., 2025): same FineMath4+ source and SwallowMath rewrite prompt, but generated with Qwen3 instead of Llama for permissive licensing.
CraneMath is an independent reproduction of SwallowMath (rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt) - methodology directly borrowed.

CraneMath methodology directly mirrors SwallowMath (rewriting FineMath4+); the OLMo team uses the SwallowMath rewrite prompt verbatim but with Qwen3 (avoiding Llama license restrictions). SwallowMath shaped the CraneMath recipe used in midtraining.
CraneMath (5.62B-token sub-corpus of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix used to midtrain Olmo-3-1025-7B) follows the SwallowMath data recipe.

CraneMath (in Olmo 3 7B Base midtraining mix) is a permissively-licensed reproduction of SwallowMath; the recipe (rewriting FineMath4+) is borrowed directly.

Olmo 3 Base midtraining (allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B) is methodologically inspired by SwallowMath: CraneMath is an independent permissively-licensed reproduction of SwallowMath (rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt).
CraneMath's generation recipe directly mirrors SwallowMath (Fujii et al., 2025) but swaps in a permissive Qwen3 generator instead of the Llama-licensed original.

CraneMath generation recipe (used to build a 7B midtraining component) replicates SwallowMath's rewriting protocol applied to FineMath4+.

SwallowMath (Fujii et al., 2025) inspired the CraneMath dataset for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B midtraining: SwallowMath's strong microanneal performance was corroborated, and CraneMath was created as a permissively-licensed re-derivation by rewriting FineMath4+ with Qwen3-32B using the SwallowMath prompt.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: The MegaMatt subset is an independent recreation of OctoThinker's MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max methodology, applying the same filtering recipe to post-June-2023 MegaMath-Web-Pro documents and rewriting with Qwen3 to obtain a permissively-licensed alternative.
description_variants: The MegaMatt subset is an independent recreation of OctoThinker's MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max methodology, applying the same filtering recipe to post-June-2023 MegaMath-Web-Pro documents and rewriting with Qwen3 to obtain a permissively-licensed alternative.

MegaMatt mirrors the MegaMath-Web-Pro-Max recipe from OctoThinker but recreates it openly via Qwen3 to escape Llama license restrictions.

anchor_list.excerpt: Megamath-Web-Pro-Max (Wang et al., 2025) applies Llama rewrites to naturally-occurring mathematical web text ... we re-generate it using open source models. edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B

CraneCode is a permissively-licensed recreation of SwallowCode using SwallowCode's two-stage rewriting prompts.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: The omr-rewrite-fullthoughts subset is produced by light GPT-4.1 edits of OpenMathReasoning items for clarity, flow, and LaTeX formatting while preserving all reasoning, explanations, and thoughts of the original.
description_variants: GPT-4.1 lightly rewrote nvidia/OpenMathReasoning items for clarity, flow, and LaTeX formatting (preserving reasoning) to produce the 850M-token OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts thinking-trace leaf for Olmo-3-1125-32B midtraining.
GPT-4.1 transformed OpenMathReasoning into OMR Rewrite FullThoughts used in 32B midtraining.

GPT-4.1 transformed OpenMathReasoning into OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts used in Olmo 3 32B midtraining.

GPT-4.1 transformed (lightly rewrote) the OpenMathReasoning dataset for clarity, flow and formatting (e.g., LaTeX conversion) preserving all reasoning, producing OMR Rewrite FullThoughts (850M tokens) included in midtraining for allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B.

GPT-4.1 was used (with o4-mini) to generate the Math Meta-Reasoning, Code Meta-Reasoning, and Program-Verifiable thinking-trace midtraining sub-corpora, and to lightly rewrite OpenMathReasoning into OMR Full-Thoughts, consumed by allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B.
OMR Rewrite Full-Thoughts (consumed by 32B) was produced by transforming nvidia/OpenMathReasoning via GPT-4.1.

anchor_list.explanation: OLMo 2 Dolmino Mix is the predecessor dataset whose math/Flan content (and methodology) is inherited by the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT
edges.description: QwQ-32B regenerated incomplete OpenThoughts3 math reasoning traces with up to 32K tokens, generated up to 16 code completions per prompt for Dolci Think Python Algorithms, and produced precise-instruction-following responses (verified per constraint) that populate the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix used to train Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.
description_variants: QwQ-32B regenerated incomplete OpenThoughts3 math reasoning traces with up to 32K tokens, generated up to 16 code completions per prompt for Dolci Think Python Algorithms, and produced precise-instruction-following responses (verified per constraint) that populate the Dolci-Think-SFT-32B mix used to train Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT.
QwQ-32B generates full reasoning chains and solutions for incomplete OpenThoughts3 prompts used in Think SFT 32B (math/STEM/code subsets).
QwQ-32B generates up to 16 candidate completions per prompt for the Dolci Think Python Algorithms subset used in Think SFT 32B.
QwQ-32B generates responses for precise instruction-following prompts (verified by per-constraint verifiers) used in Think SFT 32B.
Reasoning traces for incomplete OpenThoughts3 math examples in Dolci-Think-SFT-32B are regenerated by QwQ-32B with up to 32K tokens.
Code completions for Dolci-Think-SFT-32B are generated by QwQ-32B.
Precise-IF responses for Dolci-Think-SFT-32B are generated by QwQ-32B with constraint-based verifier filtering.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT
edges.description: The Dolci Think SFT mixing methodology and prompt sourcing follow the Tulu 3 SFT mixture recipe (Lambert et al., 2024); the same SFT mix recipe is applied to Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT as for the 7B counterpart.
description_variants: The Dolci Think SFT mixing methodology and prompt sourcing follow the Tulu 3 SFT mixture recipe (Lambert et al., 2024); the same SFT mix recipe is applied to Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT as for the 7B counterpart.
Decontamination procedure for allenai/Olmo-3-32B-Think-SFT's SFT mix follows the Tülu 3 Decontamination Procedure (n-gram matching with 8-grams, 0.5 overlap threshold).
Olmo 3 32B Think follows the Tulu 3 decontamination procedure for Dolci-Think-SFT-32B (Section 4.2.1 Step 4).
Tülu 3 inspired both prompt sourcing (WildChat/OpenAssistant/safety/Persona IF) and decontamination methodology for Dolci Think SFT 32B.

The set of existing-prompt sources in the 32B Dolci-Think-SFT mixture (WildChat, OASST, CoCoNot, WildGuardMix, WildJailbreak, Aya, TableGPT, OLMo Identity) is largely repurposed from the Tülu 3 SFT mixture's prompt-curation recipe.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct
edges.description: Qwen3 32B (thinking off) is the global LM judge for the chat reward in OlmoRL, applied across the Olmo 3 Instruct RL training including the 32B model.
description_variants: Qwen3 32B (thinking off) is the global LM judge for the chat reward in OlmoRL, applied across the Olmo 3 Instruct RL training including the 32B model.
Qwen3-32B serves as the global LM judge for RLVR rewards (footnote 36, §4.4).

Qwen3-32B is configured as the LLM judge during 32B Instruct RL (--llm_judge_model hosted_vllm/Qwen/Qwen3-32B), scoring rollouts with timeout 600 s, max 2048 tokens, 32K context. It judges/filters generations during RLVR training.
Qwen3-32B (thinking mode OFF) is the global LM judge for general-chat rewards in allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct's OlmoRL training.
Global LLM judge for the Instruct RL run: --llm_judge_model hosted_vllm/Qwen/Qwen3-32B (judge_max_tokens 2048, max_context 32768).
Qwen3-32B is the LLM judge serving rewards during GRPO RL.
Qwen3-32B (no-thinking) acts as the LM-judge reward model for Chat-reference and Chat-open-ended prompts in the Dolci-Instruct-RL data consumed by Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct.
Qwen3-32B serves as the hosted-vLLM LLM judge during RL rollouts (general-mix verifiable reward).
Qwen3-32B serves as LLM judge for general/IF prompts during the 32B Instruct GRPO RLVR rollouts.
Qwen3-32B (thinking off) serves as the LM judge providing general-chat reward signal during allenai/Olmo-3.1-32B-Instruct's RL training.

Qwen3-32B used as LM judge for Instruct RL on 32B.
RL uses Qwen/Qwen3-32B as the LLM judge (hosted via vLLM) to score rollouts during GRPO training.
Qwen3-32B is the LLM judge for verifiable reward in 32B RL.
RL training of Olmo 3.1 32B Instruct uses Qwen3-32B (thinking-off) as the LM-judge reward model (global default).
32B Instruct RL uses Qwen/Qwen3-32B as the LLM judge model (--llm_judge_model hosted_vllm/Qwen/Qwen3-32B), filtering reward signal during GRPO.
Qwen3-32B is used as the LLM judge during RLVR rollouts (--llm_judge_model hosted_vllm/Qwen/Qwen3-32B), filtering/scoring generations that shape the verifiable-reward signal.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: Longmino is the long-document data family used for the OLMo-3-32B long-context training stage.
description_variants: Longmino is the long-document data family used for the OLMo-3-32B long-context training stage.
Stage 3 long-context extension of Olmo 3 32B on Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (100B tokens, same proportions as 50B 7B mix). Aggregator-level edge.

Olmo 3 Base 32B's long-context extension is built on the Longmino dataset family (Dolma 3 Longmino Mix is the actual training mix; the 50B mix for 7B and 100B mix for 32B maintain the same proportions).
Stage-3 long-context training uses the Dolma 3 Longmino corpus (OLMo-longmino-mix-0925) for 100B tokens at 65k sequence length.

Stage 3 long-context extension of Olmo 3 Base 32B trains for 100B additional tokens on Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (34% long-context olmOCR data + 66% short-context data) and souped from the last three checkpoints (steps 10000/11000/11921).
Stage 3 long-context extension of Olmo 3 32B trained on a 100B-token sample of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix.
The 32B base model is context-extended to 65K tokens by training on Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (the long-context aggregator), specifically the 100B-token mix variant.
Stage 3 data is sampled from dolma3-longmino (Dolma 3 Longmino Mix), the long-document subset of Dolma 3 prepared for context extension.
The final Olmo 3 32B base model is the result of long-context extension on Dolma 3 Longmino Mix for 100B tokens, reaching a 65,536-token context window.

Olmo 3 Base 32B is trained for 100B tokens during long-context extension on a Dolma 3 Longmino Mix that preserves the 34% long-context / 66% midtraining proportions of the 50B variant; aggregator-level edge (no leaf 100B mix item exists in the lattice).
Aggregator: 100B-token Dolma 3 Longmino Mix used for Stage 3 long-context extension of Olmo 3 32B Base; final checkpoint is an average of the last three extension checkpoints.
OLMo-3 32B stage-3 (long-context) content originates from dolma3-longmino, tokenized through OLMo-longmino-mix-0925.
Stage-3 32B long-context training uses the dolma3-longmino pool of long PDF documents and the midtraining mixture.

description_variants: Gemma 3 12B is prompted on the first page of each PDF to flag standalone or linkable PII, the first stage of the multi-stage model-based PII filtering applied to the olmOCR PDF pool.

Gemma 3 12B classified the first page of each science PDF to flag documents containing sensitive standalone PII (or PII linked to individuals) for removal from the olmOCR science-PDFs pool feeding pretraining.
Gemma 3 12B Instruct classified PDFs for sensitive PII (first-page classification) during the olmOCR Science PDFs preparation that fed Olmo 3 7B pretraining.

Gemma 3 12B classified the first page of each PDF document for sensitive standalone PII detection, as part of the multi-stage PII filtering pipeline removing documents from the olmOCR PDF pool used for allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B midtraining (and pretraining).
Gemma-3 12B Instruct used as PII classifier on first page of academic PDFs to filter PII-containing documents from pretraining mix.

Gemma 3 12B was prompted on the first page of each PDF to detect sensitive standalone PII or biographical/medical/employment links to individuals; documents flagged for PII were filtered out of the olmOCR science PDFs subset of Dolma 3 Mix used by Olmo 3 7B.

Gemma 3 12B classified the first page of each PDF in the olmOCR pool for PII detection, contributing to the 4.9% PII removal before the science PDF leaf entered the pretraining mix used for Olmo-3-1025-7B.
Olmo 3 Base 7B's olmOCR PDF corpus was PII-filtered using Gemma 3 12B prompted on the first page of each document to detect sensitive standalone PII.

edges.description: Gemma 3 4B classifies the first 5,000 characters of each PDF to produce flags about document type; combined with the Gemma 3 12B output, this drives the final PII-removal rules that filter 4.9% of the pool.
description_variants: Gemma 3 4B classifies the first 5,000 characters of each PDF to produce flags about document type; combined with the Gemma 3 12B output, this drives the final PII-removal rules that filter 4.9% of the pool.
Gemma 3 4B classified the first 5,000 characters of each PDF to assign document-type flags used by the multi-stage PII filter on the olmOCR science PDFs corpus.
Gemma 3 4B Instruct classified PDF document types to inform PII-removal rules during olmOCR PDF preparation for Olmo 3 7B pretraining.

Gemma 3 4B classified the first 5,000 chars of each PDF document for document-type flags as the second stage of the model-based PII filtering pipeline filtering data used in allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B midtraining (and pretraining).

LongPpl filtering is applied to the 7B's long-context training pool: LongPpl is computed over 10B tokens of Dolma 3 Longmino Mix using Gemma 3 4B as the reference model to identify tokens dependent on long-range context.

Gemma 3 4B served as the reference long-context model for computing LongPpl over 10B Longmino tokens, used to evaluate filter candidates during long-context data curation (final filter selected was gzip-based).
Gemma-3 4B Instruct used to classify document type from first 5,000 chars of each PDF, supporting the document-type-aware PII filtering pipeline.

Gemma 3 4B was applied to the first 5,000 characters of each PDF to classify document type; the resulting flags combined with PII detection determined which documents were filtered out of the olmOCR science PDFs subset of Dolma 3 Mix used by Olmo 3 7B.

Gemma 3 4B classified the first 5,000 characters of each PDF in the olmOCR pool for PII document-type flags, contributing to the PII removal pipeline before science PDFs entered the pretraining mix used for Olmo-3-1025-7B.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: The Dolma 3 web pipeline 'closely follows that of DCLM' for heuristic filtering and quality classification, uses Resiliparse extraction following DCLM, and starts mixing experiments from the DCLM-Baseline mix; methodology is borrowed without DCLM data wholly entering training.
description_variants: The Dolma 3 web pipeline 'closely follows that of DCLM' for heuristic filtering and quality classification, uses Resiliparse extraction following DCLM, and starts mixing experiments from the DCLM-Baseline mix; methodology is borrowed without DCLM data wholly entering training.

The Dolma 3 web pipeline closely follows DCLM: Resiliparse text extraction, the DCLM heuristic-filter cascade, and a fastText quality classifier with positives mirroring DCLM (OpenHermes-2.5, ELI5) and 30GB negatives sampled from DCLM-RefinedWeb. The first round of conditional mixing was performed directly on DCLM-Baseline as a proxy.

allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B's web-data text-extraction and heuristic-filtering pipeline closely follows the DCLM-Baseline recipe; OLMo 3 uses Resiliparse extraction directly from DCLM-pool where available.

Olmo 3 web-data preparation closely follows DCLM (Li et al., 2024a): the team reuses Resiliparse-extracted text from DCLM-pool and follows DCLM heuristic-filtering procedures, and the early DCLM-Baseline mix served as the substrate for the constrained-mixing development.

DCLM (Li et al., 2024a) was the methodological inspiration for Olmo 3's web text pipeline (extraction, heuristic filtering, quality classifier examples) and the first round of conditional mixing was performed over the DCLM Baseline mix.

First-round constrained data mixing was performed on DCLM-Baseline before transferring learned preferences to Olmo 3's bespoke web data; DCLM-Baseline thus seeded the topic-mixture optimization for Olmo 3 7B.
Dolma 3 Mix re-uses the Resiliparse-extracted DCLM-baseline (DCLM-pool) where available, and the initial mixing rounds were performed over the DCLM-Baseline mix.
The Dolma 3 web pipeline (Resiliparse text extraction, heuristic filtering, fastText quality classifier) used to build the Olmo-3-1025-7B pretraining mix closely follows DCLM-Baseline's methodology.

Olmo 3 Base 7B's Common Crawl heuristic filtering and quality classifier training closely follow DCLM (Li et al., 2024); raw Resiliparse-extracted data is taken directly from DCLM-pool where applicable.
Olmo 3 7B's CommonCrawl pipeline closely follows DCLM's heuristic and quality-filtering recipe and reuses DCLM-pool Resiliparse extractions where available.

anchor_list.excerpt: Following DCLM (Li et al., 2024a), we remove HTML artifacts and extract the semantic text from WARC files using Resiliparse... Our process closely follows that of DCLM
anchor_list.explanation: Methodology (text extraction, heuristic filters, quality classifier training) is explicitly borrowed from DCLM-baseline.

anchor_list.explanation: DCLM-Baseline both seeds the methodology and serves as a literal proxy mix during conditional-mixing rounds for Dolma 3 Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: The Olmo 3 web pipeline 'closely follows that of DCLM' (heuristic filtering, Resiliparse extraction, DCLM-Baseline initial mix, fastText quality classifier with DCLM-style positives) without making DCLM data the corpus itself.
description_variants: The Olmo 3 web pipeline 'closely follows that of DCLM' (heuristic filtering, Resiliparse extraction, DCLM-Baseline initial mix, fastText quality classifier with DCLM-style positives) without making DCLM data the corpus itself.

Dolma 3 web pipeline closely follows DCLM (Resiliparse extraction, DCLM heuristic-filter cascade, fastText quality classifier with DCLM-style positives/negatives); first conditional-mixing round was performed on DCLM-Baseline as a proxy. Same methodology shaped the 32B's pretraining data.

allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B's web-data text-extraction and heuristic-filtering pipeline closely follows the DCLM-Baseline recipe; OLMo 3 uses Resiliparse extraction directly from DCLM-pool where available.
Olmo 3 32B pretraining web-data preparation also follows the DCLM-Baseline pipeline and consumes DCLM-pool extractions where available.
DCLM (Li et al., 2024a) was the methodological inspiration for the 32B Base pretraining web text pipeline.
First-round constrained data mixing for the Olmo 3 family was performed on DCLM-Baseline before transfer to bespoke web data; the resulting mix is used to pretrain Olmo 3 32B.
DCLM-baseline served as the starting Resiliparse-extracted web pool and as the prior for the conditional mixing procedure.

The all-dressed-snazzy2 web vigintiles in the 0925 mix are derived from a DCLM-style filtered Common Crawl pipeline (all_dressed_v3_weborganizer_ft_dclm_plus2_vigintiles), borrowing DCLM's filtering recipe.
The Dolma 3 web pipeline (Resiliparse text extraction, heuristic filtering, fastText quality classifier) used to build the Olmo-3-1125-32B pretraining mix closely follows DCLM-Baseline's methodology.

Olmo 3 Base 32B's Common Crawl heuristic filtering and quality classifier training closely follow DCLM (Li et al., 2024); raw Resiliparse-extracted data is taken directly from DCLM-pool where applicable.
Olmo 3 32B's pretraining web pipeline follows DCLM and reuses raw DCLM-pool Resiliparse extractions.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B
edges.description: GPT-4o-mini rewrote Reddit submission/comment pairs into multiple-choice QA flashcards (Reddit-to-Flashcards), supplying 5.9B QA tokens used to train Olmo-3-1125-32B.
description_variants: GPT-4o-mini rewrote Reddit submission/comment pairs into multiple-choice QA flashcards (Reddit-to-Flashcards), supplying 5.9B QA tokens used to train Olmo-3-1125-32B.

Reddit-to-flashcards rewrites used in 32B midtraining are produced by 4o-mini (per the YAML 'reddit-rewrites/densesub_*_4omini_rewrite' paths). 4o-mini rewrote source ELI5 content into flashcard-style training documents.
GPT-4o-mini was used to rewrite Reddit submission-comment pairs into the multiple-choice Reddit-to-Flashcards midtraining sub-corpus consumed by allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B.

anchor_list.excerpt: we then use GPT 4o-mini to rewrite submission-comment pairs from those subreddits into multiple-choice QA
anchor_list.explanation: Names GPT-4o-mini as the transformer for Reddit-to-Flashcards.

anchor_list.excerpt: gs://ai2-llm/preprocessed/reddit-rewrites/densesub_highthresh_microanneal_4omini_rewrite/...
anchor_list.explanation: Yaml path explicitly names 4omini as the rewriter model for the reddit subset of midtraining data.

anchor_list.excerpt: We first identify a subset of academically-relevant subreddits, and then use GPT 4o-mini to rewrite submission-comment pairs from those subreddits into multiple-choice QA task formats to increase diversity.
anchor_list.explanation: Identifies GPT-4o-mini as the rewriter that produced the Reddit-to-Flashcards dataset.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: OlmoBaseEval is the 43-task aggregate evaluation suite developed for Olmo 3 Base; covers Base Main / Base Easy / Base Held-out / Base Chat / Base LC and Code/Math/MC STEM/MC Non-STEM/GenQA/FIM clusters.
description_variants: OlmoBaseEval is the 43-task aggregate evaluation suite developed for Olmo 3 Base; covers Base Main / Base Easy / Base Held-out / Base Chat / Base LC and Code/Math/MC STEM/MC Non-STEM/GenQA/FIM clusters.

Olmo 3 Base 7B is evaluated against OlmoBaseEval, a 43-task suite (Base Easy / Base Main / Base Held-out) developed for in-loop and post-hoc decisions during pretraining, midtraining, and long-context extension.

OlmoBaseEval (Easy suite QA/Math/Code averages) is the evaluation target for swarm-based data-mix optimization and quality-aware-upsampling validation that produced the Dolma 3 Mix used to pretrain Olmo 3 Base 7B (Tables 38-40 report BPB scores).

description_variants: Midtraining (Stage 2) of Olmo 3 Base 32B uses 100B high-quality tokens sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; the final 32B midtrained checkpoint is a soup of two midtraining runs with differing seeds.
The 32B long-context Stage 3 mix maintains the same proportions as the 50B mix (34/66), drawing 66% of its 100B tokens from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix as short-context interleaving.
Stage 2 midtraining of Olmo 3 32B used Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix; the 32B midtraining was done as two parallel runs that were souped together.
Olmo-3-1025-7B was midtrained for 100B tokens on Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, a newly introduced midtraining data pool combining novel synthetic sources with quality-filtered pretraining data.
34% of the 32B's long-context training mix is short-context data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to prevent short-context degradation during long-context extension.
32B stage 2 data is sampled from dolma3-dolmino (Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix family).

Leaf component of the 100B Longmino Mix used for Olmo 3 Base 32B: 66% short-context midtraining data sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, scaled to the 100B budget.
The 34% short-context portion of the Dolma 3 Longmino 100B mix is sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to prevent regression on short-context tasks during Olmo-3-1125-32B Stage 3 long-context extension.
Olmo-3-1125-32B is midtrained on 100B tokens of Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix as Stage 2 of base training.
Aggregator: 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix run twice with different seeds for 32B midtraining; weights averaged into final checkpoint.
Short-context portion (66% of 100B = 66B tokens) of Olmo 3 32B Stage 3 training is sampled from Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix to preserve short-context performance.

Midtraining ingredient 1 trained on OLMo-midtraining-mix-0925-ingredient1-100B.txt (the 0925 dolma3-dolmino realization with refined sub-corpus labels: cranecode, cranemath, dolmino-math, dolmino_1-flan, megamatt CC snapshots, omr-rewrite-fullthoughts, openthoughts2/qwq/r1/gemini/llama_nemotron reasoning traces, tinymath, tulu-3-sft, verifiable-gpt41/o4mini, etc.).

Midtraining ingredient 2 trained on OLMo-midtraining-mix-0925-ingredient2-100B.txt — has identical sub-corpus labels to ingredient 1 (cranecode, cranemath, dolmino-math, dolmino_1-flan, megamatt CC snapshots, omr-rewrite-fullthoughts, openthoughts2/qwq/r1/gemini/llama_nemotron reasoning traces, tinymath, tulu-3-sft, verifiable-gpt41/o4mini, etc.) but with different sample weights/seed.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B's heuristic filtering and HTML-text extraction pipeline closely follow those of DCLM (Li et al., 2024a), and DCLM-pool's Resiliparse-extracted data is directly leveraged where applicable.
description_variants: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B's heuristic filtering and HTML-text extraction pipeline closely follow those of DCLM (Li et al., 2024a), and DCLM-pool's Resiliparse-extracted data is directly leveraged where applicable.
Heuristic filtering and FastText quality classifier training closely follow DCLM (Li et al., 2024a), with minor modifications to improve data quality and computational efficiency.

DCLM's text-extraction pipeline (Resiliparse on WARC files) and heuristic filtering recipe were adopted (with minor modifications) for Olmo 3 7B's web data; team also directly reused DCLM-pool's Resiliparse extractions for dumps already covered. Quality classifier training also follows DCLM's choice of positive/negative examples.
Dolma 3 Mix's web-data preparation (text extraction, heuristic filtering, deduplication, MADLAD-style sentence rules) closely follows the DCLM recipe.

edges.subject: allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B
edges.description: the-stack-v2 (Lozhkov et al., 2024) is the upstream GitHub-repository corpus that Stack-Edu (the direct code data source for Olmo 3 7B) re-curates with educational programming filtering.
description_variants: the-stack-v2 (Lozhkov et al., 2024) is the upstream GitHub-repository corpus that Stack-Edu (the direct code data source for Olmo 3 7B) re-curates with educational programming filtering.
Olmo 3 Base 7B's CraneCode midtraining sub-corpus sources Python from the-stack-v2-smol (smol variant of bigcode/the-stack-v2) before applying SwallowCode rewriting.

CraneCode (a midtraining sub-corpus of allenai/Olmo-3-1025-7B) sources Python files from The Stack v2 Smol subset, then applies syntax/lint filtering and Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct two-stage rewriting.

anchor_list.excerpt: we use Stack-Edu (Allal et al., 2025), an improved curation of GitHub repositories from the-stack-v2 dataset (Lozhkov et al., 2024)
anchor_list.explanation: Section 3.4.3 names the-stack-v2 as the upstream source from which Stack-Edu is derived; captures the indirect lineage feeding Olmo 3 pretraining.

anchor_list.excerpt: we source data from the Python subset of the-stack-v2-smol
anchor_list.explanation: the-stack-v2 supplies the Python source data for CraneCode consumed by Olmo 3 Base 7B.

anchor_list.excerpt: rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt ... we collect the Megamath-Web-Pro data occurring after June 2023 ... we created a fully-open replica of SwallowCode ... starting with just the python files from The Stack v2 Smol ... we adopt the TinyGSM protocol (Liu et al., 2023a) and prompts to generate 100 new problems for each existing MATH problem
anchor_list.explanation: Names the raw source datasets that synthetic midtraining sub-corpora are derived from.
anchor_list.position: Section 3.5.2 Math/Code capabilities, pages 23-24; Appendix A.3.1, page 92

anchor_list.excerpt: we applied a two-stage rewriting process, first to generate code data that is more compliant to the python style guides (SGCR), and then to generate optimized code (SCOR); both using the prompts from the original SwallowCode paper and Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct (Qwen et al., 2024).
anchor_list.explanation: Identifies Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct as the rewriter producing CraneCode.

anchor_list.excerpt: we re-generate this dataset using open source models. Specifically, we collect the Megamath-Web-Pro data occurring after June 2023, apply filtering as in Megamath-Web-Pro-Max, and rewrite it using Qwen3 (Yang et al., 2025a). This yields 3.88B tokens of high-quality data, which we refer to as MegaMatt.
